text: Search filters reset every time I return from a product page.
My refund was approved yesterday but the app still shows it as pending.
Face ID login is finally reliable. Much faster than typing my password.
The courier was rude when the parcel arrived.
The app says delivered while the parcel is still marked in transit on the tracking page.
Search is much better, but all my saved filters disappeared after the update.
Amazing update—now checkout crashes every single time. Five stars for consistency.
Pembayaran berhasil, but the order still appears as unpaid in the app.
The promo code applies, then disappears when I choose a saved card.
Support chat closes whenever I attach a screenshot.
I can report a suspicious seller from the order screen now. Thank you.
A full-screen ad covers the add-to-cart button and the close icon does nothing.
The refund button is disabled and the help article sends me back to the same page.
A seller asked me in chat to pay by bank transfer outside HarborCart.
The delivery estimate was clear and the live map matched the driver's arrival.
